author: Samuel Vaillant
subject: test(createManagerError): avoid to rely on helper internal (algolia/react-instantsearch#1826)
body:
* test(createManagerError): avoid to rely on helper internal

* test(createManagerError): add comment about promise chain

* test(createManagerError): drop the default implem for the mock

* test(createManagerError): use async/await + setImmediate to flush micro tasks

* test(createManagerError): fix typo succesful -> successful
